violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The condensate from the island oasis and espresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
The floors in the storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (cutting boards) were observed with an accumulation of black and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Cream cheese was observed held at 49-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to another unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

At the time of inspection, ambient of prep unit #1 was 48 degrees Fahrenheit, PIC took unit out of service. No foods were stored in unit. Ambient of prep unit #2 was 44 degrees Fahrenheit, foods were moved to prep unit #3. Establishment is to not store TCS foods in either prep unit #1 and #2 until units have reached 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The condensate from the espresso machine and island oasis machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
Observed several missing ceiling tiles throughout kitchen area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The floors in the storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings and black/brown debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The vents throughout the establishment have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (cutting boards) were observed with an accumulation of black/brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved all product to ice bath. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Cheeses were observed held at 50-55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Sausage, eggs and cream cheese were observed held at 42-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Bagels and juice packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

At the time of inspection, Ambient of prep unit #1 was 51 degrees Fahrenheit, PIC took unit out of service. Foods that were above 45 degrees Fahrenheit were disposed of all other foods moved to prep unit #3. Ambient of prep unit #2 was 56 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC took unit out of service. Per interview of PIC, foods were put in there 1 hour prior, product moved to prep unit #3. Establishment is to not store TCS foods in either prep unit #1 and #2 until units have reached 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The condensate from the espresso machine and island oasis machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
Observed several missing ceiling tiles throughout kitchen area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
The floors in the storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The vents throughout the establishment have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
